languages.text: "Вытащи меня из-под обстрела, живо! У тебя минута, или до конца жизни будешь патрулировать задворки Даргонуса!"
"Get me the void out of here! You have one minute, or I will have you patrolling Dargonus backstreets for the rest of your life!"
languages.original_text: "Вытащи меня из-под обстрела, живо! У тебя минута, или до конца жизни будешь патрулировать задворки Даргонуса!"

traits.locale_text: "Get me the void out of here! You have one minute, or I will have you patrolling Dargonus backstreets for the rest of your life!"
"Get me the void out of here! You have one minute, or I will have you patrolling Dargonus backstreets for the rest of your life!"

languages.text: «¡Sáqueme de aquí de inmediato! ¡Tiene un minuto para aparecer o haré que patrulle las callejas de Dargonus durante el resto de su vida!».
languages.original_text: "Get me the void out of here! You have one minute, or I will have you patrolling Dargonus backstreets for the rest of your life!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Sáqueme de aquí de inmediato! ¡Tiene un minuto para aparecer o haré que patrulle las callejas de Dargonus durante el resto de su vida!».

languages.text: “你他妈赶紧把我从这里弄出去！限你一分钟的时间，否则你后半辈子就在达戈努斯的小巷子里巡逻吧！”
languages.original_text: "Get me the void out of here! You have one minute, or I will have you patrolling Dargonus backstreets for the rest of your life!"

traits.locale_text: “你他妈赶紧把我从这里弄出去！限你一分钟的时间，否则你后半辈子就在达戈努斯的小巷子里巡逻吧！”

languages.text: « Sortez-moi de là, et que ça saute ! Vous avez une minute, faute de quoi vous ferez le planton dans les allées sordides de Dargonus jusqu'à la fin de vos jours ! »
languages.original_text: "Get me the void out of here! You have one minute, or I will have you patrolling Dargonus backstreets for the rest of your life!"

traits.locale_text: « Sortez-moi de là, et que ça saute ! Vous avez une minute, faute de quoi vous ferez le planton dans les allées sordides de Dargonus jusqu'à la fin de vos jours ! »

languages.text: 「この虚空から出してくれ！一分ある、あるいは{mf|俺|私}は君に残りの人生をかけてダルゴナス裏通りをパトロールさせることになるだろう！」
languages.original_text: "Get me the void out of here! You have one minute, or I will have you patrolling Dargonus backstreets for the rest of your life!"

traits.locale_text: 「この虚空から出してくれ！一分ある、あるいは{mf|俺|私}は君に残りの人生をかけてダルゴナスアンダーハイヴをパトロールさせることになるだろう！」

languages.text: "Uçsuz aşkına, çıkar beni buradan! Bir dakika içinde burada olmazsan hayatının kalanında Dargonus'ta sokak devriyesi gezersin!"
languages.original_text: "Get me the void out of here! You have one minute, or I will have you patrolling Dargonus backstreets for the rest of your life!"

traits.locale_text: "Uçsuz aşkına, çıkar beni buradan! Bir dakika içinde burada olmazsan hayatının kalanında Dargonus'ta sokak devriyesi gezersin!"

languages.text: "Holt mich hier raus, verdammt! Ihr habt eine Minute Zeit, bevor ich Euch für den Rest Eures Lebens die Hinterhöfe auf Dargonus patrouillieren lasse!"
languages.original_text: "Get me the void out of here! You have one minute, or I will have you patrolling Dargonus backstreets for the rest of your life!"

traits.locale_text: "Holt mich hier raus, verdammt! Ihr habt eine Minute Zeit, bevor ich Euch für den Rest Eures Lebens die Hinterhöfe auf Dargonus patrouillieren lasse!"
